meta.tldr: This release introduces improvements to existing features and addresses several fixes. The `read_file` tool now supports chunked reading, enabling more targeted file access and potentially improving performance when dealing with large files. The "Lazy Teammate Mode" experimental toggle has been added, providing a new way to interact with the tool, although its specific functionality isn't detailed here. A fix has been implemented to exclude the `new_task` tool from the system prompt in yolo/headless mode, ensuring more predictable behavior in those environments. Additionally, a formatting issue with the Kanban demo video has been resolved, improving the user experience for those exploring the Kanban feature. The `Notification` hook functionality has been polished, suggesting refinements to its behavior or interface. Users relying on the `read_file` tool or the yolo/headless modes should consider upgrading to benefit from these improvements and fixes. The changes to the `Notification` hook may require some review to ensure compatibility with existing workflows.

features.name: W&B Inference by CoreWeave API provider
features.description: Added W&B Inference by CoreWeave as a new API provider with 17 models

features.name: Parallel tool calling support
features.description: Improved parallel tool calling support for OpenRouter and Cline providers

features.name: Dynamic Free Model Detection for Cline API
features.description: Implement dynamic free model detection for Cline API

features.name: File Read Deduplication Cache
features.description: Add file read deduplication cache to prevent repeated reads

features.name: Feature Tips Tooltip During Thinking State
features.description: Add feature tips tooltip during thinking state

features.name: Cline Kanban Launch Modal
features.description: Launches Cline Kanban by default with a migration view in webview.

features.name: Disable Feature Tips Toggle
features.description: Adds a toggle to disable feature tips in chat.

features.name: Repeated Tool Call Loop Detection
features.description: Detects repeated tool call loops to prevent infinite loops and token wastage.

features.name: Lazy Teammate Mode
features.description: Adds an experimental toggle for 'Lazy Teammate Mode'.

features.name: `read_file` tool chunked reading
features.description: `read_file` tool now supports chunked reading for targeted file access

features.name: Lazy Teammate Mode experimental toggle
features.description: Adds an experimental toggle for "Lazy Teammate Mode".
